titleStmt.title: SII 8.50: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 50. (A.R. No. 462 of 1902). ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE SAME PRAKARA.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī cakalapuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ Avaṉiāḷappiṟantārāṉa śrīkopperuñciṅkatevaṟku yāṇṭu muṉṟāvatu ḷ 3 100 2 10 5- ṉāl taṉiyūr perumpaṟṟappuliyūr mulaparuṣai yār Eḻuttu . nammur nilakkaṇakku taṉmapiriyaṉum
tillaimuvāyiraveḷāṉum kaṇṭu Uṭaiyār tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyār cāttiaruḷa Aracūruṭaiyār ceṅkaṉivāyarāṉa piḷḷai coḻakoṉār Āḷiyār tirunantavaṉamākac ceyyak koṇṭu viṭṭa Ivvūr melpi(ṭ)ṭākai kaṅkaikoṇ
ṭacoḻapperiḷamaināṭṭu Iruntacceriyāṉa caṇṭeśva ranallūrppāl śrīcuntaracoḻavatikku meṟku śrīcoḻakulacuntarivāykkālukkut teṟku 3- kū 4- catirattu vācciyaṉ nakkaṉ tiruñāṉacampantaṉpakkal koṇṭu viṭṭa nilam
4� kiḻakku nta�- ṉāl maṭakku nilam �m vācciyaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ dabhrasabhāpa tiyum Ivaṉ tampi tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ tevakaḷtevaṉumpakkal vilaikoṇṭa nilamāy vācciyaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ
pañcavaṉ prahma mārā yarperil kuṟaitta nilam mukkāṇi Araikkāṇikkiḻ muṉṟu mā mukkāṇiyiṉāl maṭakkunilam kiḻakku I-m Uṭaiyār tiruppuliśva ramuṭaiyār tirunāmattukkāṇiyāyp parivattaṉaiyāṟ pukunta Iṣapatevaviḷākameṉṟu peru
ṭaiya nilattu nilam-m kha pama� kiḻakku kha4�- ṉāl maṭakku nilam pa ma � kiḻakku n ta-m Uṭaiyār tiruppuliśva ramuṭaiyār tirunantavaṉattu Uṭkkiṭaiyāy Akappaṭa palavaravai niṟṟamutu caṅkaṭuvāṉukku Acceric cāttaṅkuṭiyi laṭaippāṉa nilattālk kuḻi Eṇpatte
ḻe mukkāle Oru māvukkut talaimāṟu Iccaṇṭeśva ranallūr Iṣapatevarviḷākattup parivattaṉaiyāyp pukunta kuḻi 8 10 7nta pa-ṉāl Ūrppaṭi nilam � kiḻakku �ṉāl maṭakku nilam kiḻakku �vum Āka Uṭaiyār tiruppuliśva ramuṭaiyār tirunāmattukkāṇiy pa
rivattaṉaiyāy pukunta nilamkhasa kiḻakku �ma�- ṉāl maṭakku nilam � kiḻakku nta �- vum Āka nilam � kiḻakku I�-ṉāl maṭakku nilam ma kiḻakku kha4� Innilam �ma� kiḻakku � �- ṉāl maṭakku nilam ma kiḻakkukha4� yum Ipperarkaḷilk kuṟaittu
muṉṟāvatu pacāṉmutal Ūrkkī ḻiṟaiyiliyāka Ūrmāvinta kaṭamai kuṭimai nellarici payaṟu Uṭpaṭṭa kaṭamaikaḷ tavirntu Ūrk kiḻiṟaiyiliyāka Immaṭakkuk kaḻittu Ūril nikkiṉiṉṟa maṭakkile viḻukkā ṭiṭṭukkoḷḷak kaṭavutākappaṇṇuvate . Ip
paṭi ceyyakkaṭavutākac coṉṉom . Ivai Aruḷāl Ūrkkaṇakkut tiruvuṭaiantaṇappiriyaṉ Eḻuttu mulaparuṣaiyār Eḻuti Eḻuttiṭṭa niyokappaṭi kal veṭṭiyatu
Digital edition of SII 8.50 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
